name: Citynet AT - BACKUP Network
notes:
Backup / Maintenance Internet Backbone ASN

Peering through route servers is usually preferred over dedicated BGP sessions, especially for low-volume, low-prefix peers that are already connected to the route servers.

Although having an open peering policy we do ask from our peers: 

- an updated PeeringDB entry
- reasonable prefix aggregation
- responsive NOC
- IX-link must not be congested
- IPv6 peering, if peer AS is v6 enabled

Public Network Status- and Maintenance Website: https://status-citynet.at
